name: Front Hood Compton Crips
description: Front Hood Compton Crips The Original Front Hood Compton Crips (OFHCC) are an African-American street gang on the W est Side of Compton. They are west of the Poccet Hood Compton Crips, and East of the West Side Piru. Their neighborhood spread from W 130th St to 138th Street. Wilmington Ave to the Compton Creek acts as their borderline.

sources.title: Original Front Hood Compton Crip — StreetGangs
